questions: Kickstarter e ki ki project hoy?
Kickstarter ar Indiegogo er difference ki?
answers: Kickstarter is a crowdfunding platform where creators can raise money for creative projects like tech gadgets, games, films, music, and art from backers worldwide.
Kickstarter e project launch korte hole ekta compelling page banao, video add koro, reward tiers set koro, ar funding goal define koro. All-or-nothing model follow kore.
Kickstarter follows an all-or-nothing model meaning you only get funded if you reach your goal, while Indiegogo offers flexible funding where you keep whatever you raise.
Successful Kickstarter campaigns have a great video, clear description, attractive backer rewards, strong social media presence, and a realistic funding timeline.
